capabilities_and_context: can follow a canonical GOV.UK hand-off when one is identified
context: The researcher needs explicit hypotheses, gaps and evaluation status rather than invented findings.
exclusion_notes: Not a demographic profile or a proxy for protected characteristics.
Not evidence that every individual in this task class has the assigned overlays.
goal: test whether content structures support evidenced user needs
jobs_to_be_done: test whether content structures support evidenced user needs
known_limitations: No authorised participant research has validated this profile.
Preflight evidence is URL-identity level, not claim-level verification.
The profile must not be used to infer an individual's eligibility or protected characteristics.
primary_outcome: test whether content structures support evidenced user needs
research_questions: Does this archetype describe a distinct information need rather than a demographic segment?
Which channels, terms and relationship paths fail for this archetype?
Which accessibility, language, jurisdiction or risk overlays materially change the task?
success_criteria: reach an appropriate next step without unsupported certainty
title: Service designer or user researcher
trigger: The researcher needs explicit hypotheses, gaps and evaluation status rather than invented findings.
trust_and_provenance_needs: explicit lifecycle, jurisdiction and language boundaries
